name: KOC Engine
tagline: Making creator-brand collaboration accessible for everyone, not just the biggest brands and influencers.
description: AI-powered bilateral matching platform connecting cross-border e-commerce brands with vetted Key Opinion Consumers (KOCs). Features dual-pledge escrow, 7-dimension AI matching, real-time performance analytics, and automated anti-fraud enforcement. Built for Amazon sellers, DTC brands, and small content creators.
features: AI Smart Matching — 7-dimension scoring across niche, region, tier, trust, and performance
Dual-Pledge Escrow — Brands pre-pay commission pool, creators deposit pledge. Both sides protected.
Red Line Anti-Fraud — 7 behavioral detection rules with symmetric enforcement for brands and creators
Trust Tiers — Public L1-L3 (creators) and M1-M3 (merchants) scores based on collaboration history
Performance Analytics — Real-time dashboard with views, engagement, conversions, and ROI per creator
Per-Task Pricing — No monthly fees. Pay per collaboration with built-in escrow.

pricing.brandFee: 5pt platform fee per task + commission pool (set by brand)
